scripts.dev: sh -c 'if [ -f .env ]; then set -a; . ./.env; set +a; fi; turbo run dev watch --concurrency=20'
scripts.dev:php: sh -c 'if [ -f .env ]; then set -a; . ./.env; set +a; fi; turbo run dev:php --filter=@wgw/dev-server'
scripts.dev:ui:watch: sh -c 'if [ -f .env ]; then set -a; . ./.env; set +a; fi; turbo run watch --filter=@wgw/admin --filter=@wgw/drive --filter=@wgw/voice --filter=@wgw/mail --filter=@wgw/user-settings --filter=@wgw/install --filter=@wgw/notes --filter=@wgw/home'
scripts.build: sh -c 'if [ -f .env ]; then set -a; . ./.env; set +a; fi; turbo run build'
scripts.test: sh -c 'if [ -f .env ]; then set -a; . ./.env; set +a; fi; turbo run test --filter=@wgw/api'
scripts.setup:macos: sh -c 'if [ -f .env ]; then set -a; . ./.env; set +a; fi; pnpm --filter @wgw/api setup:macos'
scripts.preview:macos: sh -c 'if [ -f .env ]; then set -a; . ./.env; set +a; fi; pnpm --filter @wgw/api preview:macos'
